channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: BBC investigates misleading claims about fake portable air conditioners
item.description: As UK heatwaves persist, consumers are being warned about deceptive advertising for so-called 'portable air conditioners' that promise rapid cooling. The Advertising Standards Authority (ASA) has flag...

item.title: Minister addresses concerns over infrastructure funding delays
item.description: The article discusses the recent developments regarding the allocation of funds for critical infrastructure projects across the country. A senior minister has called for urgent action to address delay...

item.title: Kenya adjusts fiscal strategy to address revenue shortfalls
item.description: The Kenyan government, facing revenue gaps and public resistance to new taxes ahead of the 2027 elections, is shifting its financial approach. Instead of broad tax hikes, President William Ruto's admi...

item.title: Ateneo clarifies Tab Baldwin's consultancy status with DOLE amid labor disputes
item.description: The Ateneo de Manila University (AdMU) has clarified that head coach Tab Baldwin is contracted as a consultant rather than an employee under a consultancy agreement, addressing ongoing legal scrutiny ...

item.title: Royal Couple to Open Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games
item.description: The royal couple will officially open the Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games on 23 July, marking the start of the 23rd edition of the event. Over 3,000 athletes from 74 nations will compete across 10 spo...

item.title: NGT halts cricket stadium activities over groundwater usage concerns
item.description: The National Green Tribunal (NGT) has issued an interim order to restrict three major cricket stadiums in Mumbai, Jaipur, and Raipur from conducting sports activities without its permission. The order...

item.title: Building collapse in Kano leaves four people trapped, three rescued
item.description: A two-storey building under construction at Sultan Road in Kano collapsed around 9 a.m. on Friday, trapping four people beneath the rubble. Eyewitnesses reported that construction workers noticed sign...

item.title: Ethiopia's Political Shift: Abiy Ahmed's Term-Limit Plan and Its Implications
item.description: Prime Minister Abiy Ahmed of Ethiopia has proposed a two-term limit for the head of government, framing it as a democratic step. However, the focus has shifted to whether the National Dialogue is prep...

item.title: Senate Approves Blue Passports for Former Parliamentarians
item.description: The Pakistan Senate has approved a bill granting blue passports to former parliamentarians, their spouses, and dependent children under 28. The legislation, introduced by Senator Abdul Qadir, aims to ...

item.title: Bishnoi Gang's Political Violence and Legal Challenges in Canada
item.description: The Bishnoi gang, a transnational organized crime group with deep ties to India, has been implicated in a series of violent acts targeting South Asian expatriates in Canada. The group's alleged involv...

item.title: Iranian mourners show defiance amid Khamenei's funeral
item.description: The article discusses the emotional and political reactions of Iranian citizens following the funeral of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. Mourners gathered in Tehran to pay respects, with many e...

item.title: Enyobeni Tavern tragedy: Court rules tavern owners may be criminally liable for 2022 deaths
item.description: The Mdantsane regional court has ruled that the deaths of 21 young people at Enyobeni Tavern in June 2022 were likely caused by the actions or failures of the tavern's owners, Siyakhangela and Vuyokaz...

item.title: DCP Leader Urges Local Leadership in Ol Kalou By-Election
item.description: Rigathi Gachagua, leader of the Democracy for Citizens Party (DCP), has urged Nakuru Senator Irungu Kang’ata and the Linda Mwananchi movement to avoid interfering in the Ol Kalou parliamentary by-elec...

item.title: TARURA Enhances Quality Control for Infrastructure Projects
item.description: The Tanzania Rural and Urban Roads Agency (TARURA) has expanded its quality control measures by establishing a network of modern laboratories across the country. These labs test construction materials...

item.title: Landslide in Lanao del Sur kills five villagers
item.description: A landslide triggered by heavy rains from Super Typhoon Inday (Bavi) killed five villagers in Barangay Ngingir, Calanogas, Lanao del Sur, on July 10. The incident occurred after two days of recurring ...

item.title: Pauline Hanson and Angus Taylor clash over One Nation policies and election strategies
item.description: Opposition leader Angus Taylor has intensified criticism of the minor party One Nation, calling their policies 'incoherent' and warning they could exacerbate Australia's economic crisis. In response, ...

item.title: BLACKPINK's Lisa Spotted at Family Dinner with Mystery Man, Sparks Speculation
item.description: BLACKPINK member Lisa's personal life has once again become a focal point of public speculation following a viral video clip allegedly capturing her at a family dinner with her parents and an unidenti...

item.title: Bhatti Vikramarka Criticizes BRS Leaders for Misleading Claims on Government Welfare Schemes
item.description: Deputy Chief Minister Mallu Bhatti Vikramarka has accused Bharat Rashtra Samiti (BRS) leaders of attempting to mislead the public about the welfare schemes implemented by the Congress government in Te...

item.title: Critics argue NATO's support for Ukraine prolongs conflict and risks European stability
item.description: The original text presents a strongly opinionated critique of NATO's involvement in the俄乌战争 (Ukraine-Russia war), arguing that continued Western military support for Ukraine is exacerbating geopolitic...

item.title: Trump's New Air Force One Lacks Key Defensive Systems, Report Warns
item.description: President Donald Trump's newly acquired Qatari jet, used for recent international travel, has raised security concerns due to its lack of advanced defensive systems compared to older Air Force One mod...
